---
title: "Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell"
---

## Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell

**Dates:** (1833-1910)

**Maiden name:** (Rolls)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1881), and <i>Mothers in Council</i>, church worker, hymn writer

### Biography

Sister of the 1st Lord Llangattock, she married(1860) Frank Johnstone Mitchell (d. 1913) of Llanfrechfa Grange, Monmouth.[PB 1914]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- [To Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell, July 31, 1899.](../letters/3414_To_Elizabeth_Harcourt_Mitchell.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
